result.stderr:
MarkdownLinkChecker 0.3.5
Copyright (C) 2026 erikschierboom

  -v, --verbosity    Set the verbosity level. Allowed values are q[uiet],
                     m[inimal], n[ormal] (default) and [d]etailed.

  -d, --directory    The directory to operate on. Any relative file or directory
                     paths specified in other options will be relative to this
                     directory. If not specified, the working directory is used.

  -e, --exclude      A list of relative Markdown file paths to exclude from
                     checking.

  -f, --files        A list of relative Markdown file paths to checking. All
                     Markdown files are checked if empty.

  -m, --mode         Which links to check. Allowed values are f[iles], u[rls]
                     and a[ll] (default).

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
